# SparseNeuroHyperVec { #neuroim.SparseNeuroHyperVec }

```python
SparseNeuroHyperVec(data, mask, space, label='')
```

Sparse 5D+ neuroimaging hypervector.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                                                   | Description                                                       | Default    |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| data   | [np](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)               | Sparse data array with shape (n_features, n_timepoints, n_voxels) | _required_ |
| mask   | [LogicalNeuroVol](`neuroim.neuro_vol.LogicalNeuroVol`) | 3D mask indicating which voxels contain data                      | _required_ |
| space  | [NeuroSpace](`neuroim.neuro_space.NeuroSpace`)         | 5D+ spatial metadata                                              | _required_ |
| label  | [str](`str`)                                           | Label for the hypervector                                         | `''`       |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [apply_feature_func](#neuroim.SparseNeuroHyperVec.apply_feature_func) | Apply function across features at each voxel/time. |
| [as_dense](#neuroim.SparseNeuroHyperVec.as_dense) | Convert to dense representation. |
| [mean_features](#neuroim.SparseNeuroHyperVec.mean_features) | Average across feature dimension. |
| [select_features](#neuroim.SparseNeuroHyperVec.select_features) | Select subset of features. |
| [series](#neuroim.SparseNeuroHyperVec.series) | Extract time series for given coordinates. |

### apply_feature_func { #neuroim.SparseNeuroHyperVec.apply_feature_func }

```python
SparseNeuroHyperVec.apply_feature_func(func)
```

Apply function across features at each voxel/time.

### as_dense { #neuroim.SparseNeuroHyperVec.as_dense }

```python
SparseNeuroHyperVec.as_dense()
```

Convert to dense representation.

### mean_features { #neuroim.SparseNeuroHyperVec.mean_features }

```python
SparseNeuroHyperVec.mean_features()
```

Average across feature dimension.

### select_features { #neuroim.SparseNeuroHyperVec.select_features }

```python
SparseNeuroHyperVec.select_features(indices)
```

Select subset of features.

### series { #neuroim.SparseNeuroHyperVec.series }

```python
SparseNeuroHyperVec.series(coords, feature=None)
```

Extract time series for given coordinates.
